Our Services

Our SCS-007 Services Include

SCS-007 Certification Readiness

Chain of Custody & Traceability

Ethical Sourcing & ESG Due Diligence

Audit Prep & Certification Support

Standards & Frameworks We Follow

SCS-007 Certification Readiness

Prepare for SCS-007 with a quick readiness check. We assess your supply chain, ESG systems, and carbon data for compliance.

Supply Chain Evaluation

Review sourcing records, traceability data, and supplier compliance for certification alignment.

ESG System Check

Assess existing ESG frameworks, due diligence, and risk controls against SCS-007 criteria.

Carbon Practice Review

Analyze carbon footprint data and emissions reporting to meet verified climate requirements.

![](https://growlity @media (max-width: 767px) { } /* 2. Inner Flex Layout & Gap */ /* 3. Button Wrapper Alignment */ /* 4. Button Mobile Padding */ @media (max-width: 767px) { } /* 5. Section Title Typography */

Certification Types Supported

Get certified with confidence. We support SCS-007 and Chain-of-Custody certifications for climate-neutral and traceable sourcing goals.

SCS-007 Climate-Neutral Certification: For companies or products aiming to be labeled as “Certified Climate Neutral,” we support full GHG inventory, carbon reduction strategy, and offset documentation.
Chain-of-Custody Certification: We help you demonstrate traceable sourcing and responsible business conduct throughout your gemstone or jewelry supply chain.

Why Growlity?

![End-to-End Expertise](https://growlity @media (max-width: 767px) { } /* 2. Inner Flex Layout & Gap */ /* 3. Button Wrapper Alignment */ /* 4. Button Mobile Padding */ @media (max-width: 767px) { } /* 5. Section Title Typography */

FAQs

On The Side of Ambitious

 Action 

We help brands stand out and grow by creating innovative, results-driven strategies that engage customers and drive success.

What does SCS-007 certify?

It certifies responsible sourcing, traceability, and climate neutrality for gemstones and jewelry—ensuring environmental and social accountability.

Is traceability mandatory under SCS-007?

Yes. Full traceability from source to market is a core requirement and includes ownership transfers, declarations, and process transparency.

Do I need carbon offsets for climate-neutral certification?

Yes. You’ll need a verified carbon footprint and offset strategy. We help calculate emissions and select eligible offset projects.

What kind of businesses need SCS-007?

Gemstone and jewelry exporters, traders, manufacturers, and even mines seeking global market credibility benefit from this certification.

Can Growlity help across countries and suppliers?

Yes. We build systems that integrate multi-country supply chains and support training across geographies.

Explore More

You might also Be Interested In…!!!

ESG Reporting

ESG Reporting refers to the structured disclosure of a company’s Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance. It enables businesses to demonstrate how they manage risks and opportunities across climate change, resource efficiency, human rights, ethical governance, diversity, and more. In today’s investor-driven, regulation-focused environment, ESG reporting is no longer optional—it’s a strategic imperative. ESG disclosures influence investment decisions, consumer trust, regulatory compliance, and corporate reputation.

Read More

ESG Reporting

Net Zero & Decarbonisation

Net Zero is no longer a distant ambition, it’s a business-critical commitment. At Growlity, we help organizations chart their Net Zero transformation with robust GHG accounting, practical decarbonisation strategies, and alignment with frameworks like the GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, SBTi, and CDP. Whether you’re just beginning your decarbonisation journey or already setting net zero targets, our sustainability consultants deliver tailored solutions that are strategic, science-based, and results-driven.

Read More

Net Zero & Decarbonisation

CDP Reporting

CDP is a globally recognized environmental disclosure system that enables organizations to report their carbon emissions, climate-related risks, and environmental performance. Trusted by thousands of investors, companies, and cities, CDP plays a critical role in driving climate transparency and accountability. As a CDP consultant and disclosure partner, Growlity empowers organizations to navigate the full CDP reporting framework, enhance data quality, and improve scores. Our expert support ensures climate compliance, strengthens sustainability disclosures, and reinforces stakeholder trust—positioning your business for credible, low-carbon growth.

Read More

CDP Reporting
